headline: Is Hubbell (HUBB) Pricing Reflecting Its Grid Spending Story And Recent Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Hubbell's recent run justifies the current share price, this article walks through what the numbers say about value and risk. The stock trades at US$489.07 after a 3.5% gain over the last 7 days, a 7.1% decline over 30 days, a 5.6% return year to date and a 41.7% gain over 1 year, with a 117.9% return over 3 years and 180.8% over 5 years. Recent news around Hubbell has focused on its role within capital goods and electrical equipment, along with how investors are...
